Added: Slim icon sidebar replaces bottom dock — cleaner navigation
Host/SFTP segment switch in the header with animated indicator
Host grid view — cards side by side instead of vertical list
Clean session tab styling with rounded borders and accent highlight
Header avatar placeholder for future account/sync features
Focus trapping for drawers and modals (keyboard accessibility)
Keyboard navigation in file explorer (arrow keys, Enter)
File explorer grid rows show keyboard focus indicators
Header window drag via native API — drag from empty spaces
Sync delete command (server + client fully wired)
Auto-sync toggle with 5-minute background timer
Specific content for all legal pages (Terms, Privacy, Blog, etc.)
Changed: Hosts and SFTP share one "Servers" view with segment toggle
Header search bar centered with proper spacing
Settings screen now renders alongside other views with consistent layout
Settings cards redesigned with icons, better spacing, hover effects
Session tabs now show clean rounded style instead of browser-style tabs
Vault page simplified — status dot indicator, encryption feature list
SFTP list uses folder icon instead of text badge
SFTP view toolbar matches host view for visual consistency
Fixed: SSH connection failure no longer shows blank terminal
Terminal font changes apply instantly from Settings
Linux and Windows bundle targets added to release CI
Header empty spaces now draggable for window movement
Segment switch indicator properly fits both buttons
Gear icon added for Settings in sidebar
ftp directory listings now show file type, size, and dates

Added: Light mode theme — switch between dark and clean white UI
Terminal font family and size settings (JetBrains Mono, SF Mono, Fira Code, more)
Remote file browser list now uses the same card style as the host list
Live status bar: active connection, session count, vault, host count, sync status
Closing a session tab now also terminates the process on exit
Performance benchmark script and report template
Zero-Knowledge E2EE cloud sync backend (FastAPI + PostgreSQL + Docker)
Client-side AES-256-GCM encryption layer for cloud sync
Cloud sync configuration in Settings (server URL, token, pull/push)
Changed: SSH connect screen: modern dot-wave animation replaces globe loader
Failed connection screen: cleaner "Bağlanamadı" with retry, edit, close buttons
FTP file listings now show file type, size, and modification date
Vault view: status dot indicator + encryption feature list
Status bar replaces placeholder ping with live host count
Remote site rows now use consistent host-row design with SFTP badge
All UI colors now adapt to light mode via CSS theme tokens
Fixed: SSH connection failures no longer leave a blank terminal — error screen shown
Terminal font changes from Settings now apply immediately
Cross-platform SSH home directory resolution on Windows
Release workflow supports Linux (deb/AppImage) and Windows (NSIS) builds

Added: Updates in this release — see termsh.app/changelog for details.
Unlock the vault with macOS Keychain so you can open termsh without entering your master password every time
Option to forget saved Keychain access from Vault settings
App version shown in Settings
Release notes on the website
Changed: Refined top bar on macOS — navigation and window controls line up more cleanly
Clearer app icon in the Dock and installer
Command palette shortcuts to Snippets and Keys
Fixed: Improved overall stability of the desktop app

Added: First termsh release for macOS — SSH sessions and a local terminal in tabs
Encrypted vault for passwords and SSH keys
Host library with search, tags, and colours
Quick command palette (⌘K) and keyboard shortcuts
Menu bar shortcut and built-in themes
Host cards show the server type when termsh can detect it
